latin: Iuvenis pauper, in prora navis maximae stans, brachia extendit et in ventum clamavit: 'rex mundi sum!'

questions.prompt: Where is the young man standing?
questions.target: On the prow of a great ship
choices: On the prow of a great ship

questions.prompt: What is ironic about his proclamation?
questions.target: He is actually poor, not a king
choices: He is actually poor, not a king

translation: A poor young man, standing on the prow of the greatest ship, stretched out his arms and shouted into the wind: 'I am the king of the world!'
